name: add-ci
description: Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline with lint, test, and build

node-version.description: Node.js version for the CI runner

package-manager.description: Package manager used by the project

steps.task: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml. It should: (1) trigger on push to main and pull requests, (2) use Node.js {{node-version}}, (3) install dependencies with {{package-manager}}, (4) run lint if a lint script exists, (5) run tests, (6) run build if a build script exists. Include caching for node_modules.
Add a Dockerfile for containerized deployment. Include a .dockerignore file. Ensure the container runs the built application. Add health check if the project is a server.
Validate the CI workflow YAML is syntactically correct. Verify the Dockerfile builds successfully (dry run). Update README with CI badge and deployment instructions.
